subject: English
title: The Last Leaf – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by O. Henry
Sue and Johnsy are two young artists living together
She believes she will die when the last ivy leaf falls
Behrman paints the last leaf to give her hope
characters: Johnsy – A young artist who loses hope during illness
Sue – Johnsy’s caring and supportive friend
Behrman – An old painter who sacrifices his life to save Johnsy
themes: Hope can change a person’s life
Friendship and care help in difficult times
literary_devices: Symbolism – The last leaf represents hope
Irony – Behrman becomes famous only after his sacrifice
exam_tips: Remember that Behrman painted the last leaf
Focus on the theme of hope and sacrifice
Mention the role of Sue in supporting Johnsy
Explain why the leaf is called Behrman’s masterpiece
